abstracted_issue.description: The Layer 2.6 canonical cache key representing the issue type.

velocity_impact.description: The predicted change in project velocity. Negative values indicate delay/friction.

impact_score.description: Calculated operational impact based on domain weight and delay duration.

confidence.description: 0.0 to 1.0 based on signal clarity and domain alignment.

trend_direction.description: The directional momentum vector triggered by this signal.

urgency.description: The required response time based on momentum impact.
